name: Water game simulator
short_description: A classic casual puzzle game that simulates a water ring machine.
detailed_description: This is a classic casual puzzle game that simulates a water ring machine. By using the mouse and keyboard to control the movement of the circular ring in the underwater ring machine, there are nine scene levels in the game. Once the goal of one scene is achieved, a new scene level can be unlocked. The game will record your best performance, come and challenge yourself!
about_the_game: This is a classic casual puzzle game that simulates a water ring machine. By using the mouse and keyboard to control the movement of the circular ring in the underwater ring machine, there are nine scene levels in the game. Once the goal of one scene is achieved, a new scene level can be unlocked. The game will record your best performance, come and challenge yourself!
supported_languages: English, French, German, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
